message:
feat(core,db,server): identity module expansion, reconstruct overhaul, TUI screen refinements

Core:
- Expand identity module with additional agent detection and resolution
  logic for improved multi-agent environment handling

DB:
- Major reconstruct module overhaul (~576 lines changed) with improved
  archive recovery, message coalescing, and error handling paths

Server:
- TUI compose view adjustments
- Dashboard screen refinements
- Explorer screen improvements
- Search screen query handling adjustments

Beads:
- Update issue status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
